nodes.label: substitute field
nodes.semantic_role: large right-hand semantic field where artificial operates as substitute, replacement, imitation, or extension
nodes.notes: The large circle. Do not label this circle artificial; artificial is the selected point inside it.

nodes.label: artificial
nodes.semantic_role: selected word inside the substitute field
nodes.notes: Primary subject of Chart 2. Render as a filled point.

nodes.label: not natural
nodes.semantic_role: pressure field created by opposition to naturalness
nodes.notes: Must remain visually and semantically distinct from not real.

nodes.label: not real
nodes.semantic_role: pressure field created by realness, genuineness, imitation, and falseness judgments
nodes.notes: Use the short upper/lower panel label not real; evidence can include not genuine.

nodes.label: suspicion
nodes.semantic_role: diagonal tension-line label created by pressure between not natural and not real
nodes.notes: Render as a small line label, not a third pressure circle.

nodes.label: artificial flowers
nodes.semantic_role: substitute-field evidence for artificial as imitation or replacement of a natural object
nodes.notes: Default lower-panel evidence. May optionally bridge toward not-real pressure.

nodes.label: artificial teeth
nodes.semantic_role: substitute-field evidence for artificial as body replacement
nodes.notes: Default lower-panel evidence; keep as one sparse label.

nodes.label: artificial light
nodes.semantic_role: substitute-field evidence for artificial as environmental or perceptual replacement
nodes.notes: Default lower-panel evidence and bridge to natural-light contrast.

nodes.label: artificial limb
nodes.semantic_role: optional substitute-field evidence for artificial as bodily replacement
nodes.notes: Optional / secondary label. Do not let the chart become a body-replacement chart.

nodes.label: natural light ↔ artificial light
nodes.semantic_role: not-natural evidence pair linking environmental perception to artificial/natural contrast
nodes.notes: Default lower-panel evidence.

nodes.label: natural flavor ↔ artificial flavor
nodes.semantic_role: not-natural evidence pair linking taste and food language to artificial/natural contrast
nodes.notes: Default lower-panel evidence; keep from dominating Chart 2.

nodes.label: natural ingredients ↔ artificial ingredients
nodes.semantic_role: not-natural evidence pair linking consumer discourse to artificial/natural contrast
nodes.notes: Default lower-panel evidence; points toward Chart 4 without becoming Chart 4.

nodes.label: fake
nodes.semantic_role: not-real pressure evidence
nodes.notes: Use as pressure evidence only, not as the origin definition of artificial.

nodes.label: not genuine
nodes.semantic_role: not-real pressure evidence around authenticity and genuineness
nodes.notes: Chosen instead of genuine because it fits the pressure-field label directly.

nodes.label: imitation
nodes.semantic_role: not-real pressure evidence linking substitute use to authenticity questions
nodes.notes: Default lower-panel evidence and bridge term.

nodes.label: not natural ≠ not real
nodes.semantic_role: boundary warning that the two pressure fields are distinct, not equivalent
nodes.notes: Can appear near the suspicion line, possibly more visible on suspicion hover.

nodes.label: pressure field
nodes.semantic_role: legend item for hollow circle
nodes.notes: Use with hollow circle glyph.

nodes.label: selected word
nodes.semantic_role: legend item for filled point
nodes.notes: Use with filled circle glyph.

nodes.label: Artificial Under Pressure
nodes.semantic_role: working title
nodes.notes: Locked working title for Chart 2 planning.

nodes.label: From substitute to suspicion
nodes.semantic_role: working subtitle
nodes.notes: Locked working subtitle for Chart 2 planning.

nodes.label: when artificial is selected
nodes.semantic_role: lower panel selected-state label
nodes.notes: Use as the lower panel section label.
